note: Build artifact confirms: startup index 50 kB (was 890 kB, 94% reduction), largest chunk editor-prosemirror 330 kB (eager only because Editor is the startup view), no large-chunk warning. 11 lazy panels wired with React.lazy + Suspense + render-time gating. Vendor families chunked correctly via vite manualChunks. Marked/DOMPurify scoped to preview-markdown chunk so Preview is the only consumer that pays.
